title: Fix APK download API TypeScript body handling
description: The new /api/download-apk route reads the APK as a Node Buffer and passes it directly to Response, which fails the browser-compatible BodyInit TypeScript contract. Convert the bytes to a Response-safe Uint8Array/ArrayBuffer and verify the PWA/TWA branch compiles.

title: Add visible APK availability feedback on the download page
description: Improve /download-apk by checking whether the APK endpoint is available and showing a clear unavailable/authenticated state before the user taps Download.

title: Reduce duplicate color utility drift in themed components
description: Several components now use repeated CSS variable class strings for theme-aware borders and cards. Extract common utility components or style helpers to reduce maintenance drift.

title: Add an authenticated download audit log
description: Record successful APK downloads with timestamp and requester metadata server-side so PWA/TWA distribution can be monitored without exposing secrets.
